cards.title: Why Parental Social Media Use Affects Children's Happiness
cards.body: A psychotherapist shares how banning herself from social media improved her mood and family relationships. Setting strict limits on phone usage reduced snappiness and strengthened parent-child connections.

cards.title: Having Children Makes Your Brain Healthier and Younger
cards.body: Recent studies show mothers and fathers have healthier, younger-looking brains than non-parents. Years of mental and emotional parenting challenges appear to boost cognitive benefits.

cards.title: Coping With Family Anxiety and Learning Resilience
cards.body: A parent shares how worrying about worst-case scenarios changed when a real emergency tested her coping skills. Facing challenges head-on revealed she could handle crises better than anticipated.

cards.title: What Is Mindful Parenting and How It Helps
cards.body: Mindful parenting helps parents maintain calm when emotions override judgment with their children. Three simple steps can help you react more thoughtfully instead of regretfully.

cards.title: How to Help Children Through Divorce With Resilience
cards.body: How parents handle divorce significantly shapes their child's future emotional health and adaptability. Age-specific, practical strategies help children adjust to family changes with confidence.

cards.title: Free Play: Why Children Need Time Away From Structure
cards.body: Free play has quietly disappeared from modern childhood despite being crucial for healthy development. The film Toy Story 5 explores why unstructured playtime remains essential.

cards.title: Understanding Donor-Conceived Children and Siblings
cards.body: Donor siblings are a common concern for donor-conceived families but are manageable with proper support. Working with families shows these concerns need not be destabilizing.

cards.title: When Adult Children Blame Parents: How to Respond
cards.body: Adult children blaming parents for struggles can trap families in guilt and rescue cycles. Three effective strategies help parents respond in ways that build independence.

cards.title: A Dad's Guide to Taking His Autistic Son to Formula 1
cards.body: Silverstone Grand Prix provides accessible experiences for autistic fans and their families. One father shares how the venue made watching live racing viable for his son.
